events.name: Light Fingers
events.gmPrompt: A shadow detaches itself from the alley wall. Soft, barely audible fabric against fabric. Someone is testing whether the camp is watched.
events.checkContext: Can the watch spot the thief before they reach the packs?
events.gmGuidance: Urban pickpocket, not a combat threat. They flee if spotted. The check is spotting them before they start, not fighting. auto_fail without a watch because nobody is awake to notice. item_at_risk targets consumables and gold. Severity 2/5 on mixed, 3/5 on failure. Never takes weapons or armour.
events.description: Someone is testing whether the camp is watched.

onTriumph.narrative: You caught the shadow testing the approach before they even reached the packs. A drawn weapon and a steady look. They backed off and disappeared.

onSuccess.narrative: You spotted the silhouette just as they reached the first pack. A sharp word and steel drawn. They vanished into the side streets before grabbing anything.

onMixed.narrative: You caught them with hands already in the packs. They bolted, but not before pocketing a few things. A potion here, a handful of coin there.

effects.narrative: A thief got away with a couple of small items.

effects.description: A handful of coin lifted from the packs.

onFailure.narrative: Quick hands, professional job. By the time anyone wakes, the shadow is long gone. Packs rifled through, potions missing, coin purses lighter.

effects.narrative: A thief cleaned out several items.

events.name: Street Disturbance
events.gmPrompt: Shouting. The shattering of a glass bottle. Heavy running footsteps. The neighbourhood is not settling down tonight.
events.checkContext: Can the party sleep through the noise?
events.gmGuidance: Not a threat, just noise. Constitution save to sleep through it. Per-character because some people sleep heavier than others. This is the most common urban event -- a reminder that cities are loud. The noise is external and unrelated to the party.
events.description: The neighbourhood is not settling down tonight. Shouting, bottles, running footsteps.

onTriumph.narrative: Out cold within minutes. The city could burn down around you and you would not notice. Best sleep in weeks.

onSuccess.narrative: Earplugs, pillow over the head, and sheer exhaustion. You sleep through the worst of it.

onMixed.narrative: Woke twice. Managed to get back to sleep both times, but the rest was shallow.

onFailure.narrative: The noise continues until an hour before dawn. Tossing and turning all night. Exhausted by morning.

events.name: Late-Night Peddler
events.gmPrompt: A quiet, rhythmic knock. A hooded figure outside with a pushcart. They have a few useful things mixed in with the junk.
events.checkContext: Can the watch judge the goods and get a fair deal?
events.gmGuidance: Insight to read the merchant. This is not a full shop. Triumph auto-grants a healing potion, success auto-grants an antitoxin. No gold transaction automated (payment is narrative only, same as other discovery rewards). Mixed/failure are a decline. Proper vendor workflow deferred to Workshop module. Only fires if watch is set.
events.description: A late-night peddler with a few useful things mixed in with the junk.

onTriumph.narrative: Legitimate stock, fair prices. A healing potion wrapped in cloth at the bottom of the cart. A good deal by anyone's measure.

onSuccess.narrative: Good enough stock. An antitoxin buried under a pile of trinkets. Worth picking up.

onMixed.narrative: The prices did not add up. You thanked the merchant and closed the door. No deal, no harm.

onFailure.narrative: Nothing on that cart was worth the risk. A polite decline and a bolted door. Time saved, coin kept.

events.name: City Watch Patrol
events.gmPrompt: The sweeping glow of a bullseye lantern and the clink of chainmail. The city watch is making aggressive neighbourhood rounds tonight.
events.checkContext: Can the watch handle the patrol without disrupting the rest of the party?
events.gmGuidance: Charisma to talk your way through it. The watch is not hostile, just suspicious. Triumph gets a friendly exchange. Failure gets an hour of interrogation. escalate without a watch because an unattended camp in a city looks suspicious. noWatchAmplifier 2 because the watch will wake everyone and search everything.
events.description: The city watch is making rounds. Lanterns and chainmail approaching.

onTriumph.narrative: A confident greeting and a brief, friendly exchange. The watchmen nod, wish you well, and move on. They might even mention something useful about the neighbourhood.

onSuccess.narrative: Polite greeting, confident explanation. The watchmen seem satisfied and move on without trouble.

onMixed.narrative: They lingered. Papers checked, a few pointed questions, some suspicious glances. Eventually moved on, but the interruption woke half the camp.

onFailure.narrative: The patrol is suspicious and thorough. An hour of pointed questions, travel papers scrutinised, packs searched. They leave eventually, but the rest is ruined.

effects.description: Interrupted rest from city watch inspection.

events.name: City Sounds
events.gmPrompt: Distant lute music from a tavern blocks away. The smell of baking bread from a bakery starting its ovens early. A lone tomcat yowling from a rooftop. The city never truly sleeps, but tonight it hums a gentle tune rather than screaming.
events.gmGuidance: Pure atmosphere. No mechanical consequence. A moment of warmth and normality. Contrast to the wilderness terrains. Rest is undisturbed.
events.description: The city hums gently tonight. Distant music, baking bread, a yowling tomcat.
